template_data.label_above: Federal awards to small businesses, Q2 2026
template_data.context_html: Eight industries. One quarter. Most small businesses in those exact spaces weren't registered to compete for any of it.
template_data.image_headline: THE MONEY IS REAL. ARE YOU IN?
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic stat layout. Dark navy background. Center: giant bold number '$11.8B' with label 'Q2 2026 SMALL BIZ AWARDS' below it. Three short callout labels beneath: 'DOD $5.5B', 'VA $3.6B', 'DHS $3.2B' each with a small arrow icon. Left side: illustrated professional in business casual looking at an upward-trending bar chart. Bold headline at top: 'THE MONEY IS REAL. ARE YOU IN?' One highlighted callout box bottom-center: 'BARRIER IS ACCESS, NOT ODDS'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
